attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT         AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
SPEP.START_DATE                  AS START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE(SPEP.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  END_TV_DTM,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NPS.PARTY_KEY     AS SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,	
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')            AS ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD,
COALESCE(SPEP.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,'MANUAL')       AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
SPEP.SPLIT_PERCENT*100         AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
COALESCE(SPEP.REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                 AS NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,	
COALESCE(SPEP.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,'=')              AS OWNED_FLG,
COALESCE(SPEP.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,'UNKNOWN')          AS HQ_REMOTE_CD,
COALESCE(SPEP.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,'UNKNOWN')    AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,	
COALESCE(SPEP.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')             AS VALIDATION_MODE_CD,
COALESCE(SPEP.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                AS VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(NES.ERP_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')                AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,	
SPEP.VALIDATION_DATE      AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,	
SPEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID            AS SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SPEP.UCRM_CASE_NUM AS UCRM_CASE_NUM, /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/		
SPEP.ACTION_CD			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS SPEP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
ON SPEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPS
ON SPEP.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID = NPS.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPS.SS_CODE='CR'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SPEP.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NES
ON SPEP.USER_NAME=NES.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_LINK_BIZ BIZV
ON SPEP.SAV_MEMBER_ID = BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_NO_VLD_SA_GRP_PTY_RSN_BIZKEY NNVSGPRB 
ON SPEP.REASON_CODE = NNVSGPRB.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,START_TV_DTM,ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC)=1

UNION

SELECT
NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT	 AS BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,
BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT         AS BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,
SPEP.START_DATE                  AS START_TV_DTM,
COALESCE(SPEP.EXPIRATION_DATE,CAST('3500-01-01 00:00:00' AS TIMESTAMP(0)))  END_TV_DTM,
NP.PARTY_KEY                     AS FIELD_VLDTD_END_CUST_PRTY_KEY,
NPS.PARTY_KEY     AS SLS_ACCT_GRP_MEMBER_PARTY_KEY,	
NPSV.PARTY_KEY    AS SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_PARTY_KEY,
COALESCE(SPEP.ENRICHMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')            AS ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD,
COALESCE(SPEP.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,'MANUAL')       AS ENRICHMENT_CUSTOMER_TYPE_CD,
SPEP.SPLIT_PERCENT*100         AS END_CUST_OWNERSHIP_SPLIT_PCT,
COALESCE(SPEP.REASON_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                 AS NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME,	
COALESCE(SPEP.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,'=')              AS OWNED_FLG,
COALESCE(SPEP.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,'UNKNOWN')          AS HQ_REMOTE_CD,
COALESCE(SPEP.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,'UNKNOWN')    AS ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CD,	
COALESCE(SPEP.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,'UNKNOWN')             AS VALIDATION_MODE_CD,
COALESCE(SPEP.STATUS_CODE,'UNKNOWN')                AS VALIDATION_STATUS_CD,
COALESCE(NES.ERP_USER_NAME,'UNKNOWN')                AS LAST_UPDATED_BY_USER_NAME,	
SPEP.VALIDATION_DATE      AS LAST_UPDATED_DTM,	
SPEP.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID            AS SK_TRX_PARTY_EXTENSION_ID_INT,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_CREATE_USER,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) 		EDW_UPDATE_DTM,
USER  				EDW_UPDATE_USER,
SPEP.UCRM_CASE_NUM AS UCRM_CASE_NUM, /* Added as part of AugFY16 relese*/	
SPEP.ACTION_CD			ACTION_CODE,
'I'				DML_TYPE
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS SPEP
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NP
ON SPEP.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID = NP.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NP.SS_CODE='CR'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY NPS
ON SPEP.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID = NPS.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPS.SS_CODE='CR'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_PARTY_TV NPSV
ON SPEP.SAV_ID = NPSV.PARTY_SSOT_PARTY_ID_INT
AND NPSV.SS_CODE = 'SAV'
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_ERP_USER NES
ON SPEP.USER_NAME=NES.ERP_USER_NAME
INNER JOIN  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_BKG_POS_TRANSACTION_LINE NPTL
ON SPEP.POS_TRANS_ID = NPTL.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SALES_ACCOUNT_GROUP_LINK_BIZ BIZV
ON SPEP.SAV_MEMBER_ID = BIZV.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT
LEFT JOIN $$SLSORDVWDB.N_NO_VLD_SA_GRP_PTY_RSN_BIZKEY NNVSGPRB 
ON SPEP.REASON_CODE = NNVSGPRB.NO_VLD_SLS_ACCT_PTY_RSN_NAME
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT,BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT,START_TV_DTM,ENRCHMNT_SLS_ACCT_PRTY_TYP_CD ORDER BY END_TV_DTM DESC)=1

SELECT
EX.ACTION_CD,                     
EX.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,              
EX.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
EX.BATCH_ID,                      
EX.CREATE_DATETIME,               
EX.CREATION_DATE,                 
EX.ENRICHMENT_CODE,               
EX.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE,            
EX.EXPIRATION_DATE,               
EX.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID,                
EX.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,             
EX.POS_TRANS_ID,                  
EX.REASON_CODE,                   
EX.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
EX.SAV_ID,                        
EX.SAV_MEMBER_ID,      
EX.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,           
EX.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
EX.SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
EX.START_DATE,                    
EX.STATUS_CODE,                   
EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,              
EX.USER_NAME,
EX.VALIDATION_DATE,
EX.UCRM_CASE_NUM
 FROM
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS  EX
WHERE EX.EXCEPTION_TYPE='RI'  AND NOT EXISTS
(  SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS STG
WHERE STG.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID=EX.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID)

SELECT
STG.ACTION_CD,                    
STG.ASSIGNMENT_CODE,               
STG.ASSIGNMENT_SOURCE_SYSTEM,      
STG.BATCH_ID,                      
STG.CREATE_DATETIME,               
STG.CREATION_DATE,                 
STG.ENRICHMENT_CODE,              
STG.ENRICHMENT_PARTY_TYPE, 
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE,        
STG.EXPIRATION_DATE,               
STG.HZ_CR_PARTY_ID ,               
STG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,              
STG.POS_TRANS_ID,                  
STG.REASON_CODE,                   
STG.SAV_HQ_REMOTE_FLAG,            
STG.SAV_ID,                        
STG.SAV_MEMBER_ID,
STG.SAV_MEMBER_PARTY_ID,                 
STG.SAV_OWNED_FLAG,                
STG.SPLIT_PERCENT,                 
STG.START_DATE,                    
STG.STATUS_CODE,                   
STG.TRX_PARTY_EXT_ID,            
STG.USER_NAME,
STG.VALIDATION_DATE,
STG.UCRM_CASE_NUM
FROM
$$STGDB.ST_OTM_TRX_PRTS_EXT_POS STG
WHERE NOT EXISTS
( SELECT 1 FROM $$WORKDB.W_VLDTD_END_CUST_POS_TRX_LN WK
WHERE STG.POS_TRANS_ID = WK.BK_POS_TRANSACTION_ID_INT
AND WK.BK_SA_MEMBER_ID_INT=STG.SAV_MEMBER_ID
AND STG.START_DATE=WK.START_TV_DTM)
